memorydb.acl.CfnAbout: Specifies an Access Control List. For more information, see [Authenticating users with Access Contol Lists (ACLs)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/memorydb/latest/devguide/clusters.acls.html).

memorydb.acl.ACLName.Description: The name of the Access Control List.

memorydb.acl.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

memorydb.acl.UserNames.Description: The list of users that belong to the Access Control List.
